ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category associated with the size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Tops Size Chart) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size range */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size range */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size range */,
  "jeans_size" TEXT /* Jeans size range */,
  "bust_size" TEXT /* Bust size measurement */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size measurement */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip size measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "pants_length" TEXT /* Pants length measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the size conversion */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label for the converted size */,
  "bust_size" TEXT /* Bust size measurement for the converted size */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size measurement for the converted size */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip size measurement for the converted size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the converted size */,
  "pants_length" TEXT /* Pants length measurement for the converted size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "requested_size" TEXT /* Requested size for conversion */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being analyzed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the popularity is recorded */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score representing size popularity */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products ordered */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_region" (
  "size_conversion_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion region */,
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label for the converted size */,
  "bust_size" TEXT /* Bust size measurement for the converted size */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size measurement for the converted size */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip size measurement for the converted size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the converted size */,
  "pants_length" TEXT /* Pants length measurement for the converted size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_region_size_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_conversion_id")
)
